## ICE Brent Crude Oil Futures — CBN26 Contract

### Important Ticker Clarification

The ticker **CBN26** refers to the ICE Brent Crude Oil **July 2026** futures contract, not May 2026. In standard futures month codes:
- **K = May** → CBK26 would be the May 2026 contract
- **N = July** → CBN26 is the July 2026 contract

The May 2026 contract (CBK26) has already **expired** — ICE Brent futures expire on the last business day of the second month preceding the delivery month, so the May 2026 contract expired around March 31, 2026.

### CBN26 (July 2026) Latest Settlement

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Settlement Price** | **$113.81** |
| **Settlement Date** | **May 4, 2026** |
| Price Change | -$0.63 (-0.55%) |
| Bid / Ask | $113.79 / $113.82 |
| Exchange | ICE Futures Europe |
| Days to Expiration | ~25 |
| 52-Week High | $115.30 |
| 52-Week Low | $58.68 |

**Source:** Barchart.com (https://www.barchart.com/futures/quotes/CBN26), cross-checked against Yahoo Finance BZ=F front-month pricing (~$113.82).

### Notes
- The settlement price of $113.81 is confirmed by the "s" suffix on Barchart's last price field.
- If the expired May 2026 (CBK26) final settlement price is needed, that would require ICE's historical end-of-day reports.
